title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 31.
content:
There was a Young Lady of Norway,
    Who casually sat in a doorway;
    When the door squeezed her flat,
    She exclaimed, "What of that?"
    This courageous Young Lady of Norway.
meaning:
"Book Of Nonsense Limerick 31." is a quintessential example of Edward Lear's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
